title: lastrea palustris
intro: Lastrea palustris, also known as the Marsh Fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Lastrea palustris include its ability to reduce inflammation and its antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of the Marsh Fern include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Lastrea palustris can be made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
